name: @centraid/agent-runtime
description: Unified local agent runtime for centraid: drives one turn over the Agent Client Protocol for every runner kind, launching first-party ACP adapters for CLIs that lack an ACP mode. Used by both the per-app data chat and the builder. Ships a tiny `centraid` CLI bin agents shell out to.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/backends/acp && cp src/backends/acp/vault-mcp-stdio-proxy.mjs dist/backends/acp/
